ActorFolder.Name: Actor Folder
ActorFolder.Hint: Folder to organize interactive object actors into. Select an existing folder or type a new name to create one.

FolderColor.Name: Folder Color
FolderColor.Hint: Color applied to the actor folder used to organize interactive objects. Changes apply immediately to the existing folder.

DefaultContainerImage.Name: Default Container Image (Closed)
DefaultContainerImage.Hint: Default token image used when a new container is created (closed state).

DefaultContainerOpenImage.Name: Default Container Image (Open)
DefaultContainerOpenImage.Hint: Default token image used when a new container is opened for the first time.

DefaultInteractionRange.Name: Default Interaction Range
DefaultInteractionRange.Hint: Distance, in grid squares, a new interactive actor allows for pickup / open / close / lock. 0 = unlimited.

DefaultInspectionRange.Name: Default Inspection Range
DefaultInspectionRange.Hint: Distance, in grid squares, a new interactive actor allows for nameplate / sheet view. 0 = unlimited.

RequireCtrlForDrag.Name: Require Ctrl for drag actions
RequireCtrlForDrag.Hint: When enabled, dragging an item or an interactive actor from the sidebar onto the canvas requires the Ctrl key (Cmd on macOS) to be held. All other drops (sheet-to-sheet, container deposits, etc.) are unaffected.

GMOverrideEnabled.Name: GM Override Enabled
GMOverrideEnabled.Hint: When enabled, GMs see and interact with everything regardless of player gating (proximity, identification, lock state, etc.). Disable to preview the module as a player would experience it. Per-client; does not affect other GMs.

Sheet.NeedsItem: Drop an item from the Items sidebar onto this sheet to initialize this interactive object.
Sheet.Name: Name
Sheet.OpenImageHint: Image shown on the token when the container is open

Notify.ItemLocked: This item can not be picked up.
Notify.NoCharacter: No character assigned. Set your character in User Configuration.
Notify.NotPhysical: Only physical items can be placed in containers.
Notify.TooFar: You are too far away to interact with this.
Notify.NotInitialized: This interactive object needs an item before it can be placed on the canvas.
Notify.NoToken: No token found on the canvas for this character.
Notify.NoContainerInContainer: Containers cannot be placed inside other containers.
Notify.CannotGiveContainer: Container-type interactive objects cannot be placed in a player's inventory.
Notify.NoSceneActors: No eligible actors found on this scene.

Dialog.ChooseTypeHint: What kind of interactive object is this?
Dialog.Name: Name
Dialog.CreateTemplateHint: How should this item be placed on the canvas?
Dialog.CreateTemplateTemplatedHint: Creates a persistent actor in the Interactive Objects folder. The actor remains after the token is removed and can be placed again later.
Dialog.CreateTemplateEphemeralHint: Places a temporary token with no persistent actor. The actor is automatically removed when the token is deleted.
Dialog.PickupTargetHint: Choose which actor receives the item.
Dialog.DropTargetHint: The drop location overlaps a token. Choose an action below.
Dialog.MultiDropTargetHint: The drop location overlaps {count} tokens. Choose an action below.
Dialog.TokenMoveHint: The destination is occupied. Choose whether to move the token here or deposit the item.
Dialog.TokenMultiMoveHint: The destination overlaps {count} tokens. Choose whether to move the token here or pick a recipient.
Dialog.QuantityActionMove: How many of this stack should be moved?
Dialog.QuantityActionPlace: How many to place on the canvas?

Limited.DefaultDescription: You are too far away to discern any details.

Container.ContentsHidden: You are too far away to see the contents

objectType.label: Object Type
objectType.hint: Whether this is a simple item or a container

isOpen.label: Open
isOpen.hint: Whether this container is currently open

openImage.label: Open Image
openImage.hint: Token image displayed when this container is open

unidentifiedImage.label: Unidentified Image
unidentifiedImage.hint: Token image displayed when this item is unidentified

unidentifiedName.label: Unidentified Name
unidentifiedName.hint: Name shown to players before identification

unidentifiedDescription.label: Unidentified Description
unidentifiedDescription.hint: Description shown to players before identification

isIdentified.label: Identified
isIdentified.hint: Whether players can see the real name and description

lockedMessage.label: Locked Message
lockedMessage.hint: Custom message shown when a player attempts to interact with this locked object
